description: Printer auto-detection database with Klipper hardware fingerprints

heuristic_types.kinematics_match: Match against printer kinematics type (corexy, cartesian, delta, etc.)
heuristic_types.object_exists: Check if a Klipper object exists in /printer/objects/list
heuristic_types.stepper_count: Count of Z steppers (z_count_1, z_count_2, z_count_3, z_count_4)
heuristic_types.mcu_match: Match against MCU chip type or serial pattern
heuristic_types.macro_match: Match against G-code macro names (gcode_macro objects)
heuristic_types.macro_exclude: Exclude this printer if a G-code macro is present
heuristic_types.tool_count: Count of extruder tools (tool_count_1, tool_count_2, tool_count_4)
heuristic_types.cpu_arch_match: Match against host CPU architecture string

printers.name: Elegoo Centauri Carbon

calibration.bed_mesh_gcode:
MOVE_TO_TRAY
M140 S60
M104 S220
M109 S220
M190 S60
M729
G28
M400
LOAD_CELL_SAVE_TARE
G4 P2000
BED_MESH_CALIBRATE_WITH_WIPE
BED_MESH_PROFILE SAVE={profile}

printers._print_start_default_phases_comment: CC1's slicer start-gcode only heats + G28 + loads a stored BED_MESH_PROFILE (<1s). No QGL/Z_TILT/mesh-calibrate/wipe. Loadcell homing is slower than endstop homing, so 30s covers G28 alone.

heuristics.reason: Z probe present (SuperPinda or Omron inductive probe)
STM32G0B1 MCU (BTT SKR Mini E3 V3)

printers.name: Qidi X-Smart 3
printers.notes: Smallest of the Qidi 3-series (175x180x170 build volume, passive enclosure, no active chamber heater). Stock display is a TJC HMI on serial bus at 480x272 -- on-device install requires screen replacement. Works without modification as a remote target when HelixScreen runs on a separate touchscreen.
